lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇ ਤ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa keemat paae ta kahee na jaae |
lines.english: Even if its value were known, it could not be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰੈ ਸਰੀਅਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sarai sareeat kareh beechaar |
lines.english: Some think about religious rituals and regulations,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਹੈ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kudarat hai keemat nahee paae |
lines.english: The value of the Creative Power of the Universe cannot be known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਖਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ਸੁ ਬੰਦਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: vakhat veechaare su bandaa hoe |
lines.english: One who reflects upon his allotted span of life, becomes the slave of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਧਿਰਿ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਿਹ ਧਿਰਿ ਮਉਜੂਦੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jih dhir dekhaa tih dhir maujood |1|
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see God's Presence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਕੈਸੇ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin boojhe kaise paaveh paar |
lines.english: but without understanding, how can they cross over to the other side?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਦਕੁ ਕਰਿ ਸਿਜਦਾ ਮਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਖਸੂਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: sidak kar sijadaa man kar makhasood |
lines.english: Let sincere faith be your bowing in prayer, and let the conquest of your mind be your objective in life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਭਾ ਏਵ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾ ਨੇੜੈ ਨਾ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur sabhaa ev na paaeeai naa nerrai naa door |
lines.english: The Society of the Guru is not obtained like this, by trying to be near or far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਾਂ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur taan milai jaa man rahai hadoor |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, you shall meet the True Guru, if your mind remains in His Presence. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਪਤ ਦੀਪ ਸਪਤ ਸਾਗਰਾ ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਚਾਰਿ ਵੇਦ ਦਸ ਅਸਟ ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sapat deep sapat saagaraa nav khandd chaar ved das asatt puraanaa |
lines.english: The seven islands, seven seas, nine continents, four Vedas and eighteen Puraanas

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਤੂੰ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: har sabhanaa vich toon varatadaa har sabhanaa bhaanaa |
lines.english: O Lord, You pervade and permeate all. Lord, everyone loves You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਤੁਝੈ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਰਗ ਪਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tujhai dhiaaveh jeea jant har saarag paanaa |
lines.english: All beings and creatures meditate on You, Lord. You hold the earth in Your Hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧਦੇ ਤਿਨ ਹਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo guramukh har aaraadhade tin hau kurabaanaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those Gurmukhs who worship and adore the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਕਰਿ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਣਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: toon aape aap varatadaa kar choj viddaanaa |4|
lines.english: You Yourself are All-pervading; You stage this wondrous drama! ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਉ ਮਸਾਜਨੀ ਕਿਆ ਸਦਾਈਐ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹੀ ਲਿਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: klau masaajanee kiaa sadaaeeai hiradai hee likh lehu |
lines.english: Why ask for a pen, and why ask for ink? Write within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਹੈ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਨ ਤੂਟਸਿ ਨੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa saahib kai rang rahai kabahoon na toottas nehu |
lines.english: Remain immersed forever in the Love of your Lord and Master, and your love for Him shall never break.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਇਸੀ ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਛੋਡੀ ਸਚੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak seh preet na jaaeisee jo dhur chhoddee sachai paae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Love of your Husband Lord shall never perish. The True Lord has bestowed it, as it was pre-ordained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਉ ਮਸਾਜਨੀ ਜਾਇਸੀ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਭੀ ਨਾਲੇ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: klau masaajanee jaaeisee likhiaa bhee naale jaae |
lines.english: Pen and ink shall pass away, along with what has been written.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਆਵਦਾ ਨਾਲਿ ਨ ਚਲਈ ਵੇਖਹੁ ਕੋ ਵਿਉਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree aavadaa naal na chalee vekhahu ko viaupaae |
lines.english: That which is seen, shall not go along with you. What does it take to make you see this?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੀ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਕਰਮੀ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sabadee sach hai karamee palai paae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Word of His Shabad is True. By His Grace, it is obtained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਸਚਿ ਰਹਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sach drirraaeaa sach rahahu liv laae |
lines.english: The True Guru has implanted the True Name within; remain lovingly absorbed in the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕੀਚੈ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo keechai so har jaanadaa mere man har chet |
lines.english: Whatever anyone does, the Lord knows. O my mind, think of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਇਕੁ ਤੂੰ ਤੂੰ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਭੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: har andar baahar ik toon toon jaaneh bhet |
lines.english: O Lord, You are inside and outside as well. You are the Knower of secrets.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਡਰੈ ਜਿ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਵਦਾ ਧਰਮੀ ਵਿਗਸੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: so ddarai ji paap kamaavadaa dharamee vigaset |
lines.english: The one who commits sins lives in fear, while the one who lives righteously rejoices.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸੇ ਸਚਿ ਰਲੇਤੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jinaa naanak sach pachhaaniaa se sach ralet |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who recognize the True Lord are blended with the True One. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਆਉ ਸਚੁ ਤਾ ਡਰੀਐ ਕੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon sachaa aap niaau sach taa ddareeai ket |
lines.english: O Lord, You Yourself are True, and True is Your Justice. Why should anyone be afraid?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਮ ਜਲਉ ਸਣੁ ਮਸਵਾਣੀਐ ਕਾਗਦੁ ਭੀ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kalam jlau san masavaaneeai kaagad bhee jal jaau |
lines.english: Burn the pen, and burn the ink; burn the paper as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਜਲਿ ਬਲਉ ਜਿਨਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: likhan vaalaa jal blau jin likhiaa doojaa bhaau |
lines.english: Burn the writer who writes in the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak poorab likhiaa kamaavanaa avar na karanaa jaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, people do what is pre-ordained; they cannot do anything else. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਪੜਣਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hor koorr parranaa koorr bolanaa maaeaa naal piaar |
lines.english: False is other reading, and false is other speaking, in the love of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਥਿਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vin naavai ko thir nahee parr parr hoe khuaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Name, nothing is permanent; those who read and read are ruined. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੀ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਨਿਆਉ ਹੈ ਧਰਮ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kee vaddiaaee vaddee hai jaa niaau hai dharam kaa |
lines.english: Great is the Greatness of the Lord; His Justice is totally Righteous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੀ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kee vaddiaaee vaddee hai har keeratan har kaa |
lines.english: Great is the Greatness of the Lord, and the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੀ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਫਲੁ ਹੈ ਜੀਅ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kee vaddiaaee vaddee hai jaa fal hai jeea kaa |
lines.english: Great is the Greatness of the Lord; people receive the fruits of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੀ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਨ ਸੁਣਈ ਕਹਿਆ ਚੁਗਲ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kee vaddiaaee vaddee hai jaa na sunee kahiaa chugal kaa |
lines.english: Great is the Greatness of the Lord; He does not hear the words of the back-biters.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੀ ਹੈ ਅਪੁਛਿਆ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਵਕਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har kee vaddiaaee vaddee hai apuchhiaa daan devakaa |6|
lines.english: Great is the Greatness of the Lord; He gives His Gifts without being asked. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਤੀ ਸਭ ਮੁਈ ਸੰਪਉ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau karatee sabh muee sanpau kisai na naal |
lines.english: Those who act in ego shall all die. Their worldly possessions shall not go along with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਭ ਜੋਹੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae dukh paaeaa sabh johee jamakaal |
lines.english: Because of their love of duality, they suffer in pain. The Messenger of Death is watching all.
